zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Groby於1415年2月7日出生在威爾士丹比爾盧時，他的父親Reynold Grey II53歲，母親Joan Astley49歲。他於1432年之前與Elizabeth De Ferrers在英國結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1457年12月18日在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾拉特比享年42歲，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾格洛比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Groby于1415年2月7日出生在威尔士丹比爾盧时，他的父亲Reynold Grey II53岁，母亲Joan Astley49岁。他于1432年之前与Elizabeth De Ferrers在英国结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1457年12月18日在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾拉特比享年42岁，埋葬在英国萊希斯特斯爾格洛比。

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Groby was born on 7 February 1415, in Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales, his father, Reynold Grey II, was 53 and his mother, Joan Astley, was 49. He married Elizabeth De Ferrers before 1432, in England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 18 December 1457, in Ratby, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 42, and was buried in Groby, Leicestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Groby est né le 7 février 1415, à Ruthin, Denbighshire, Galles, son père, Reynold Grey II, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Joan Astley, avait 49 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth De Ferrers avant 1432, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 18 décembre 1457, à Ratby, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à Groby, Leicestershire, Angleterre.

de.Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, England: Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Groby am 7. Februar 1415 in Ruthin, Denbighshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Reynold Grey II 53 und seine Mutter Joan Astley 49. Er hat vor 1432 in England Elizabeth De Ferrers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 18. Dezember 1457 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Ratby, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Groby, Leicestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Groby è nato il il 7 febbraio 1415 nel Ruthin, Denbighshire, Galles, il suo padre, Reynold Grey II, aveva 53 anni e il suo madre, Joan Astley, aveva 49 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth De Ferrers prima del 1432, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 18 dicembre 1457, nel Ratby, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolto a Groby, Leicestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Grobyが1415年2月7日にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアルスインで生まれた時，父Reynold Grey IIは53歳，母Joan Astleyは49歳であった。1432年以前にイギリスでElizabeth De Ferrersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1457年12月18日にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアラトビーで42歳で死去し，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアグロビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Groby(이)가 1415년 2월 7일 웨일스 덴비그h실르 루스인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Reynold Grey II(은)는 53세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Astley(은)는 49세였다. 그는 1432년 이전 영국에서 Elizabeth De Ferrers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1457년 12월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 라트비에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르 그로비에 묻혔다.

pt.7 February 1415–18 December 1457: 7 de fevereiro de 1415–18 de dezembro de 1457
pt.Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, England: Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Groby nasceu em 7 de fevereiro de 1415, em Ruthin, Denbighshire, Gales, seu pai, Reynold Grey II, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Joan Astley, tinha 49 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth De Ferrers antes 1432, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de dezembro de 1457, em Ratby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 42 anos, e foi sepultado em Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Groby родился 7 февраля 1415 г. в местности рутин, денбаишир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Reynold Grey II было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Astley, 49. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth De Ferrers перед 1432 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 18 декабря 1457 г. в местности ратби, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности гроби, лисестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Edward de Grey 6th Baron Ferrers of Groby nació el 7 de febrero de 1415, en Ruthin, Denbighshire, Gales, su papá, Reynold Grey II, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Joan Astley, tenía 49 años. Se casó con Elizabeth De Ferrers antes de 1432, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 18 de diciembre de 1457, en Ratby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultado en Groby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.
